summary: A television news segment from Good Morning America / ABC News. It opens with a male reporter standing inside an airport terminal under a blue LIVE NEWARK AIRPORT banner, speaking to camera, then cuts to footage of travelers in line at an airport security checkpoint with uniformed TSA officers, and to a remote interview with a woman wearing glasses and earphones at home. A lower-third chyron reads TSA OFFICERS TO START GETTING PAYCHECKS and later TSA OFFICERS TO GET PAID AS PARTIAL SHUTDOWN DRAGS ON, with a scrolling news ticker along the bottom.

script.scene: A male reporter stands inside an airport terminal speaking to camera under a LIVE NEWARK AIRPORT banner.
Footage of travelers lined up at an airport security checkpoint with uniformed TSA officers.
A remote interview with a woman wearing glasses and earphones seated at home.

notable_text: LIVE NEWARK AIRPORT; TSA OFFICERS TO START GETTING PAYCHECKS; TSA OFFICERS TO GET PAID AS PARTIAL SHUTDOWN DRAGS ON; GMA; ABC NEWS
